track.name: I Really Want to Stay at Your House

wiki.summary: The song was produced for the game Cyberpunk 2077 (2020) for the in-game radio. It was later featured heavily in the companion anime series Cyberpunk: Edgerunners (2022), owing its jump in popularity as of mid September 2022 to the release of said series. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: The song was produced for the game Cyberpunk 2077 (2020) for the in-game radio. It was later featured heavily in the companion anime series Cyberpunk: Edgerunners (2022), owing its jump in popularity as of mid September 2022 to the release of said series. Read more on Last.fm.
